LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF FREDRICK A. HOWELL,, FREDRICK HOWELL'S MOTION FOR CHANGE OF VENUE. OFF CALENDAR. PLAINTIFFS DID NOT SERVE AND FILE THEIR MOTION AT LEAST 16 COURT DAYS BEFORE THE HEARING, AS REQUIRED BY CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE SECTION 1005(B). IF THE PARTIES STIPULATE TO A CHANGE OF VENUE TO ALAMEDA COUNTY, THEY MAY FILE AN APPLICATION FOR AN ORDER FOR HEARING ON THE COURT'S EX PARTE CALENDAR. JUDGE: ETHAN P. SCHULMAN, CLERK: M. MOTION FOR CHANGE OF VENUE
Off Calendar Aug-03-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF FREDRICK A. HOWELL,, FREDRICK HOWELL's MOTION FOR CHANGE OF VENUE.

Off calendar. Plaintiffs did not serve and file their motion at least 16 court days before the hearing, as required by Code of Civil Procedure section 1005(b). If the parties stipulate to a change of venue to Alameda County, they may file an application for an order for hearing on the court's ex parte calendar.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, NOT Reported. =(302/EPS)
